title: Asthma
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Asthma can cause wheezing, coughing, chest tightness, and shortness of breath.
Asthma attacks or flare-ups can become life-threatening and may require a change in treatment.
Asthma care includes avoiding triggers and using prescribed medicines such as inhalers.
